assumptions: No prior ClickHouse account configuration or successful use exists.
The developer has the browser and command-line tools listed by the selected path.

developer_goal: A ClickHouse Cloud service accepts SHOW databases in its hosted SQL console and returns database rows.

first_success.outcome: A ClickHouse Cloud service accepts SHOW databases in its hosted SQL console and returns database rows.
first_success.observable_signal: The SQL console displays the result set for SHOW databases.

route_selection.surface: ClickHouse Cloud quick start: service + SQL console SHOW databases
route_selection.rule: Prefer the official hosted quickstart and cURL when documented; stop at the first observable successful happy-path result.
route_selection.selected: ClickHouse Cloud quick start: service + SQL console SHOW databases

candidates.name: ClickHouse Cloud quick start: service + SQL console SHOW databases
candidates.reason: It is the specified official path to the first-success boundary.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to ClickHouse Cloud.
required_path.observable_result: The ClickHouse Cloud console is accessible.

required_path.action: Create a ClickHouse Cloud service and wait until it is ready.
required_path.observable_result: The service reports a ready/running state.

required_path.action: Open the service SQL console and run SHOW databases.
Confirm that the SQL console displays database names.
required_path.observable_result: A result set containing databases is visible.

prerequisites.description: A ClickHouse Cloud service created through the Cloud quick start.

external_gates.description: Service creation has a platform-managed provisioning wait before the SQL console is usable.

platform_outcomes.description: A ClickHouse Cloud service accepts SHOW databases in its hosted SQL console and returns database rows.

excluded.reason: This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.
This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.
This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.

sources.title: Run a query in the SQL console
evidence_supported: A ClickHouse Cloud service accepts SHOW databases in its hosted SQL console and returns database rows.
The SQL console displays the result set for SHOW databases.

uncertainties.question: Does fresh-account UI wording differ from the documented Run a query in the SQL console path?
uncertainties.impact: A human should judge minor navigation differences without moving the first-success boundary.
